name: tencent-cwp
description: OctoBus package for Tencent Cloud Host Security (CWP) API 3.0 read-only operations.

Tencent_CWP.TencentCwpService/DescribeMa.name: describe-machines
Tencent_CWP.TencentCwpService/DescribeMa.description: Query Tencent Cloud CWP protected machines.

Tencent_CWP.TencentCwpService/DescribeMa.name: describe-machine-general
Tencent_CWP.TencentCwpService/DescribeMa.description: Query Tencent Cloud CWP machine overview.

Tencent_CWP.TencentCwpService/DescribeMa.name: describe-malware-list
Tencent_CWP.TencentCwpService/DescribeMa.description: Query Tencent Cloud CWP malware events.

Tencent_CWP.TencentCwpService/DescribeVu.name: describe-vul-list
Tencent_CWP.TencentCwpService/DescribeVu.description: Query Tencent Cloud CWP vulnerability list.

Tencent_CWP.TencentCwpService/DescribeBa.name: describe-baseline-detect-overview
Tencent_CWP.TencentCwpService/DescribeBa.description: Query Tencent Cloud CWP baseline overview statistics.

Tencent_CWP.TencentCwpService/DescribeMa.name: describe-machine-risk-cnt
Tencent_CWP.TencentCwpService/DescribeMa.description: Query Tencent Cloud CWP intrusion event statistics.

Tencent_CWP.TencentCwpService/InvokeRead.name: invoke-read-only-action
Tencent_CWP.TencentCwpService/InvokeRead.description: Invoke an allowed Tencent Cloud CWP Describe* action.
